sqlMap.select: select r.* from dst_rol r where r.activo = 'S' and r.id_rol not in (select ar.id_rol from dst_accion_rol ar where ar.id_accion = #id_accion# ) order by r.nombre_rol
select r.* from dst_rol r inner join dst_accion_rol ar on r.id_rol = ar.id_rol where ar.id_accion = #id_accion#
sqlMap.delete: delete from DST_ACCION_ROL where id_accion=#id_accion# and id_rol = #id_rol#
sqlMap.insert: insert into DST_CARGA_RESPONSABLE (id_carga, id_instancia, id_persona) values (#id_carga#, #id_instancia#, #id_persona#)
update DST_CARGA_RESPONSABLE set id_persona = #id_persona# where id_carga = #id_carga# and id_instancia = #id_instancia#
sqlMap.select: select p.* from dst_persona p inner join dst_administrativo a on p.id_persona = a.id_persona inner join dst_administrativo_rol ar on a.id_administrativo = ar.id_administrativo inner join dst_rol r on r.id_rol = ar.id_rol where r.id_rol in (select id_rol from dst_accion_rol where id_accion = #id_accion#)
select a.id_administrativo from dst_carga_responsable cr inner join dst_administrativo a on cr.id_persona = a.id_persona where cr.id_instancia = #id_instancia# and cr.id_carga = #id_carga#

select distinct cr.id_persona from dst_carga_responsable cr inner join dst_accion_instancia ai on ai.id_instancia_destino = cr.id_instancia where ai.id_accion = #id_accion# and cr.id_carga = #id_carga#
select id_persona from dst_carga_responsable where id_carga = #id_carga# order by fecha_creacion desc
